svg.title: Amanuel Negash Tiruneh GitHub activity in 2026
svg.desc: GitHub activity graph for 2026 showing 2,121 contributions, daily heatmap, monthly bars, weekly trend, and active repositories.
svg.text: Real contribution calendar from January 1 through June 7, 2026. Public profile updates, repositories, private work, and engineering momentum in one view.
Each square is one day. Brighter cells mean heavier activity.
Peak week: 614 contributions. This section is intentionally 2026-only.
